name: Sunlit Sentinel
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>昼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のスナイパー
desc: You can Set this card from your hand to your Spell & Trap Zone as a Spell. Once per turn, during the Standby Phase of the next turn after this Set card was destroyed and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon this card, then destroy all cards your opponent controls in this card's column.
mnst_eff: You can Set this card from your hand to your Spell & Trap Zone as a Spell. Once per turn, during the Standby Phase of the next turn after this Set card was destroyed and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon this card, then destroy all cards your opponent controls in this card's column.
eff: You can Set this card from your hand to your Spell & Trap Zone as a Spell. Once per turn, during the Standby Phase of the next turn after this Set card was destroyed and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon this card, then destroy all cards your opponent controls in this card's column.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Sets itself from the hand as a Spell Card
Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
